name: Cheese and Meatball Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix meatball ingredients together thoroughly.
- 1 pound ground beef
- 1/4 cup bread crumbs
- 1 large egg
- 1/2 teaspoon salt
- 1/2 teaspoon Tabsco pepper sauce
2. Shape the mixture into medium-sized meatballs.
3. Place uncooked meatballs and all other ingredients, except Cheez Whiz, in an electric slow cooker.
4. Stir gently, cover, and cook on setting #2 (low) for 8 to 10 hours.
5. Before serving, add Cheez Whiz and stir gently until well blended.
